name: Magnite
description: Independent SSP for programmatic mobile, web, CTV and audio advertising formed from Rubicon Project and Telaria.

seo.title: Magnite — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: Magnite: Independent SSP for programmatic mobile, web, CTV and audio advertising formed from Rubicon Project and Telaria.

when_to_use: Programmatic SSP for premium mobile, CTV, and web publisher monetization
Header bidding infrastructure for large publishers via Prebid and SparkLyte
CTV and streaming ad monetization via independent programmatic platform
Private marketplace and guaranteed deal management for premium publishers

cons: Mobile in-app is secondary focus vs CTV
Enterprise sales process for small pubs
review.verdict: Tier-1 independent SSP, best for CTV and video pubs rather than pure mobile app focus.
review.best_for: Large publishers with CTV, video, and display inventory seeking scale demand.
review.not_for: Small mobile app-only publishers who need hands-on boutique SSP support.
